rationale: The citing paper is a broad editorial/content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and its stated prior-work anchors are other historical JMR reviews, not this specific 2013 moderated-regression tutorial. The matched evidence is only a bare DOI reference entry (no in-text citation context), suggesting this is likely one of many cataloged article mentions rather than a substantive methodological dependency in the editorial’s own analysis.
